headline: Will Costco’s (COST) Gas and Business Centre Push Refine Its Value-Driven Retail Narrative?
summary: Costco Wholesale recently expanded its footprint by opening its first Manitoba Business Centre in Winnipeg and advancing member-only stand-alone gas stations in high fuel-cost markets like California and Hawaii, while maintaining its broad value appeal with unique bulk offerings for businesses and households. Together with recognition from Consumer Reports as one of the least expensive grocery retailers and ongoing membership growth, these moves underscore how Costco is reinforcing its...
